title: Comparison and Envy
description: Leaving the habit of measuring yourself against others — toward self-effort and kinder regard.
entry_queries: everyone else is ahead of me

steps.practice: Interrupt one self-degrading habit today with one concrete uplifting replacement.
steps.reflection: In what way is my own mind currently acting as my enemy — and what would friendship with myself look like?

steps.practice: Choose one small act of goodwill toward someone with whom you have tension, when doing so is safe and appropriate.
steps.reflection: Where is hatred, possessiveness, or ego blocking my capacity to be a friend?

steps.practice: Give your full attention to today's effort, and postpone judging success until the work is complete.
steps.reflection: Where am I attaching my happiness to the outcome — and calling it high standards?
